mapper.select: SELECT checkpoints_timed, checkpoints_req, checkpoint_write_time, checkpoint_sync_time, buffers_checkpoint, stats_reset FROM pg_stat_bgwriter
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO checkpoint_raw ( instance_id, collected_at, checkpoint_type, checkpoints_timed, checkpoints_req, checkpoint_write_time, checkpoint_sync_time, buffers_checkpoint, wal_bytes, created_at ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{collectedAt}, #{checkpointType}, #{checkpointsTimed}, #{checkpointsReq}, #{checkpointWriteTime}, #{checkpointSyncTime}, #{buffersCheckpoint}, #{walBytes}, NOW() )
mapper.select: WITH time_buckets AS ( SELECT date_trunc('hour', collected_at) + INTERVAL '2 hours' * FLOOR(EXTRACT(HOUR FROM collected_at) / 2) AS bucket_time, TO_CHAR( date_trunc('hour', collected_at) + INTERVAL '2 hours' * FLOOR(EXTRACT(HOUR FROM collected_at) / 2), 'HH24:MI' ) AS time_label, checkpoints_req, checkpoints_timed, checkpoint_write_time, checkpoint_sync_time, checkpoint_write_time + checkpoint_sync_time AS total_time, buffers_checkpoint, wal_bytes FROM checkpoint_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ) SELECT time_label, bucket_time, SUM(checkpoints_req) AS requested_count, SUM(checkpoints_timed) AS timed_count, AVG(checkpoint_write_time) AS avg_write_time, AVG(checkpoint_sync_time) AS avg_sync_time, AVG(total_time) AS avg_total_time, SUM(wal_bytes) AS wal_bytes, SUM(buffers_checkpoint) AS buffers_checkpoint FROM time_buckets GROUP BY time_label, bucket_time ORDER BY bucket_time

WITH checkpoint_intervals AS ( SELECT buffers_checkpoint, checkpoint_write_time + checkpoint_sync_time AS total_time, CASE WHEN (checkpoints_req + checkpoints_timed) > 0 THEN (checkpoints_req::NUMERIC / (checkpoints_req + checkpoints_timed) * 100) ELSE 0 END AS request_ratio, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (collected_at - LAG(collected_at) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at))) / 60 AS checkpoint_interval, wal_bytes / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0 * 60 AS avg_wal_generation_speed FROM checkpoint_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= NOW() - (#{minutes} || ' minutes')::INTERVAL ) SELECT AVG(buffers_checkpoint) AS buffers_checkpoint, AVG(total_time) AS total_time, AVG(request_ratio) AS request_ratio, AVG(checkpoint_interval) AS checkpoint_interval, AVG(avg_wal_generation_speed) AS avg_wal_generation_speed FROM checkpoint_intervals

SELECT SUM(checkpoints_req) AS checkpoints_req, SUM(checkpoints_timed) AS checkpoints_timed, CASE WHEN (SUM(checkpoints_req) + SUM(checkpoints_timed)) > 0 THEN (SUM(checkpoints_req)::NUMERIC / (SUM(checkpoints_req) + SUM(checkpoints_timed)) * 100) ELSE 0 END AS request_ratio FROM checkpoint_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}

WITH checkpoint_intervals AS ( SELECT buffers_checkpoint, checkpoint_write_time + checkpoint_sync_time AS total_time, CASE WHEN (checkpoints_req + checkpoints_timed) > 0 THEN (checkpoints_req::NUMERIC / (checkpoints_req + checkpoints_timed) * 100) ELSE 0 END AS request_ratio, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (collected_at - LAG(collected_at) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at))) / 60 AS checkpoint_interval, wal_bytes / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0 * 60 AS avg_wal_generation_speed FROM checkpoint_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN NOW() - (#{minutes} * 2 || ' minutes')::INTERVAL AND NOW() - (#{minutes} || ' minutes')::INTERVAL ) SELECT AVG(buffers_checkpoint) AS buffers_checkpoint, AVG(total_time) AS total_time, AVG(request_ratio) AS request_ratio, AVG(checkpoint_interval) AS checkpoint_interval, AVG(avg_wal_generation_speed) AS avg_wal_generation_speed FROM checkpoint_intervals

SELECT checkpoint_raw_id, instance_id, collected_at, checkpoint_type, checkpoints_timed, checkpoints_req, checkpoint_write_time, checkpoint_sync_time, buffers_checkpoint, wal_bytes, created_at FROM checkpoint_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1
